text:
to each line claim record 
• Added new fields ORDRG_PRVDR_ID and ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 
to OT header 
• Added new field RX_ORGN_CD to RX header; added new fields 
to RX line: DSPNSNG_FEE_PD_AMT, 
INGRDNT_CST_BILLED_AMT, INGRDNT_CST_PD_AMT, 
PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_BILLED_AMT, PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_PD_AMT 
• Updated label for RX line DSPNSNG_FEE_AMT 
• Updated comments to show variables retired after 2022: 
COPAY_WVD_IND, CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_AMT, 
CPTATD_PYMT_BILLED_DT, DRCTNG_PRVDR_NPI, 
DRCTNG_PRVDR_TXNMY_CD,
